violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. A scoop handle was stored in the pico mixture.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The shelves above the prep area and the handles on the refrigerated equipment are due for deep cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor behind and under the cooking equipment is due for deep cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. The floor tiles in the kitchen are cracked and are due to be replaced.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Unapproved poison or toxic material was observed in food establishment. Unapproved fly spray is stored withe the sanitizing chemicals in the kitchen.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The fronts of the refrigerated equipment are all due for deep cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A case of single use cups were stored on the floor in the kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor throughout the kitchen is due for deep cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The floor tiles throughout the kitchen are cracked, broken, or missing.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. cooked hashbrowns were not kept on constant heat or constant cold.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
